inputs.label: Voltage (V)
inputs.businessContext: Nominal line-to-line voltage from motor nameplate, typically 400 V for three-phase industrial motors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal line-to-line voltage from motor nameplate, typically 400 V for three-phase industrial motors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motor etiketinden anma hatlar arası gerilim, tipik olarak üç fazlı endüstriyel motorlar için 400 V.
businessContext_i18n.de: Nennspannung zwischen den Leitungen vom Motor-Typenschild, typischerweise 400 V für dreiphasige Industriemotoren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tension nominale entre phases de la plaque signalétique du moteur, généralement 400 V pour les moteurs industriels triphasés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Voltaje nominal línea a línea de la placa del motor, típicamente 400 V para motores industriales trifásicos.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Courant à pleine charge (FLA) de la plaque signalétique du moteur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Amperaje a plena carga (FLA) de la placa del motor.

inputs.label: Efficiency (decimal)
inputs.businessContext: Motor efficiency as a decimal fraction, e.g., 0.9 for 90% per ISO 1217 or manufacturer data.

businessContext_i18n.en: Motor efficiency as a decimal fraction, e.g., 0.9 for 90% per ISO 1217 or manufacturer data.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motor verimi, ondalık kesir olarak, örn. ISO 1217 veya üretici verilerine göre %90 için 0,9.
businessContext_i18n.de: Motorwirkungsgrad als Dezimalbruch, z. B. 0,9 für 90 % gemäß ISO 1217 oder Herstellerangaben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement du moteur sous forme de fraction décimale, ex. 0,9 pour 90% selon ISO 1217 ou données fabricant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia del motor como fracción decimal, ej., 0.9 para 90% según ISO 1217 o datos del fabricante.

inputs.label: Power Factor (decimal)
inputs.businessContext: Motor power factor under full load, typically 0.8–0.9 for induction motors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Motor power factor under full load, typically 0.8–0.9 for induction motors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam yükte motor güç faktörü, asenkron motorlar için tipik olarak 0,8–0,9.
businessContext_i18n.de: Motorleistungsfaktor unter Volllast, typischerweise 0,8–0,9 für Asynchronmotoren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de puissance du moteur en pleine charge, généralement 0,8–0,9 pour les moteurs à induction.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de potencia del motor a plena carga, típicamente 0.8–0.9 para motores de inducción.

inputs.label: Phase Factor
inputs.businessContext: 1.0 for single-phase, √3 ≈ 1.732 for balanced three-phase. Default reflects common three-phase industrial supply.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1.0 for single-phase, √3 ≈ 1.732 for balanced three-phase. Default reflects common three-phase industrial supply.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek faz için 1,0, dengeli üç faz için √3 ≈ 1,732. Varsayılan, yaygın endüstriyel üç fazlı beslemeyi yansıtır.
businessContext_i18n.de: 1,0 für Einphasen, √3 ≈ 1,732 für symmetrischen Drehstrom. Standardwert spiegelt übliche industrielle Drehstromversorgung wider.
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1,0 pour monophasé, √3 ≈ 1,732 pour triphasé équilibré. La valeur par défaut reflète l'alimentation triphasée industrielle courante.
businessContext_i18n.es: 1.0 para monofásico, √3 ≈ 1.732 para trifásico equilibrado. El valor predeterminado refleja el suministro industrial trifásico común.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
